introSection: Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently located at MW's Amusement Park in Dymchurch, Kent, England, UK.
fullText: Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently located at MW's Amusement Park in Dymchurch, Kent, England, UK.
